scripts.dev:server: npm run generate-env-install && AGILIZA_INSTALL_MODE=server electron-vite dev
scripts.dev:terminal: npm run generate-env-install && AGILIZA_INSTALL_MODE=terminal electron-vite dev
scripts.build:store-server: npm ci --prefix store-server && npm --prefix store-server run build && npm prune --omit=dev --prefix store-server
scripts.build:all: npm run build:store-server && npm run build
scripts.build:win: npm run generate-env-install && npm run generate:nsis-bitmaps && npm run check:embedded-postgres && npm run build:all && electron-builder --win --config --publish never
scripts.release:win: npm run generate-env-install && npm run generate:nsis-bitmaps && npm run check:embedded-postgres && npm run build:all && electron-builder --win --config --publish always
scripts.build:win:localtest: npm run build:win && npm run release:windows:next
scripts.build:mac: npm run generate-env-install && npm run build:all && electron-builder --mac --config --publish never
scripts.build:linux: npm run generate-env-install && npm run build:all && electron-builder --linux --config --publish never
